decoded.explanation: The defendant is a first-time offender who committed a non-violent financial crime. While the breach of trust is serious, the fact that $25,000 is a relatively moderate sum and partial restitution has already been made warrants a sentence at the lower end of the sentencing guidelines. A period of 6 months incarceration is sufficient to address the punitive aspects of the law while allowing for the possibility of rehabilitation and continued restitution.
